# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3 # Istio sidecar envoy proxy config to expose admin interface(proxyAdminPort) and endpoints 
kind: VirtualService  
metadata:   
 name: my-service       # virtual service's id       
 namespace : default     # where it will be applied, if applicable (optional for istio injection only). Default value would generally just refer to the current context/namespace. For example in Kubernetes kubectl command `kubectl get pods` by running inside a cluster and getting into that specific namespace
spec:   
 hosts : ["*"]          # Matching any host (i.e., anything, * is default)     
 gateways : [ "default/my-gateway" ]  # If there are multiple Gatewaws in the current context we need to use gateway's name which matches one of them     or otherwise set it as a wildcard (*). This would be necessary when you have more than single network policy and ingress gateways.
 http:  
 - match : /config_dump, method : GET  # admin endpoints (http requests) can go here      with the methods being defined in istio routing rules for handling these request(GET/POST etc.).        eqlRequest: true    // This field will be used to set exact path or regexp.
 - match : /stats, method : GET   # Expose admin endpoints on all pods         same goes here       eqnReq :true  (for the given request).     The port name is proxy_admin by default and can vary as per service definition if you want a different one change it.
 - match: /clusters, method: GET    # This could be any other cluster endpoint(i)e., clusters or anything else       eqlRequest : true  (same goes here).      The port name is proxy_admin by default and can vary as per service definition if you want a different one change it.
